note: Runtime segments data file for the SavingsRE Luxury Value Finder. Same engine as /top3/. Edit this file to add/edit/reorder luxury segments — no page rebuild. Public data is DISGUISED (area + beds/baths + $/sqft band + price band + Ref); exact address/photos/financials live only in the private ledger. Thumbnails are REFERENCED via thumb_url (hotlinked, never stored) and must be IDX-permitted or owned imagery.

templates.luxury-value: Disguised luxury card: area + beds/baths/type + price band + $/sqft band + optional referenced thumbnail. Ranked by LOWEST $/sqft (best value).

luxury.label: Luxury — Best Value by $/sqft
luxury.blurb: Each week we surface the best-value luxury listings by price per square foot — oceanfront, intracoastal, and country-club. Pick a segment to see this week's leaders and browse past weeks. Photos referenced from IDX-permitted sources; exact address & financials shared with qualified buyers on request.

countryclub-value.label: Country Club — Best Value by $/sqft
countryclub-value.tagline: Lowest $/sqft golf & country-club luxury · SE Florida
